ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain where the cookie is set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Expiration time of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "more_info" TEXT /* Link to more information about the cookie */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics provider */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., essential, functional, analytics) */,
  "data_collected" TEXT /* Type of data collected by the cookie */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., e-commerce, informational) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the domain */,
  "domain_status" TEXT /* Status of the domain (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the domain was checked for compliance */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Primary source of traffic (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics provider (e.g., Google Analytics) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the analytics provider */,
  "privacy_policy_link" TEXT /* Link to the privacy policy of the provider */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider was integrated into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates if consent was given (true/false) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Current status of consent (e.g., given, withdrawn) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the consent status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "consent_preference" TEXT /* User's general preference for cookie consent */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the user was active on the website */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address for security and tracking purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain where the session took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Data related to the session (e.g., pages visited) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic metric record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain associated with the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metrics */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors on that day */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total page views on that day */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for that day */,
  "new_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of new visitors on that day */,
  "returning_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of returning visitors on that day */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of sessions on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_metrics_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being tracked */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain where the cookie is used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken regarding the cookie (e.g., set, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and tracking */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_logs_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., traffic, campaign) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
